internalName: Villa Seventh Heaven — Sunset Estates SE7
place: Plai Laem, Bo Phut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hilltop Four-Bedroom Sea-View Villa with Infinity Pool & Games Room - Plai Laem
blurb: A contemporary four-bedroom villa on the Plai Laem hilltop of north-east Koh Samui, framing panoramic ocean and sunset views over a large infinity pool with a built-in Jacuzzi. Beyond the four en-suite bedrooms it adds a games room, a massage room and generous entertainment space, all reached by a private lift. Fully furnished and turnkey, freehold. ฿79,500,000.
detail:
Perched on the Plai Laem hilltop on Koh Samui’s north-east coast, this contemporary four-bedroom villa pairs refined, light-filled interiors with breathtaking natural beauty — walls of floor-to-ceiling glass open the living spaces to the sea horizon, and the sunset fills the sky each evening. A private lift connects the levels.

At its heart is a large infinity pool with a built-in Jacuzzi section, edged by sun loungers and an outdoor dining area with a barbecue grill and pizza oven — a setting made for family holidays, group getaways and celebrations. Indoors, an open-plan living room with a smart TV flows from a fully equipped kitchen, while a games room, a dedicated massage room and further entertainment space give the villa a genuine resort-at-home feel.

The accommodation runs to four bedrooms and five bathrooms, sleeping up to eight. The master suite opens to the pool and ocean with a Jacuzzi bathtub en-suite; a second king suite takes in panoramic views, with the remaining bedrooms all en-suite and finished to the same standard — air-conditioning, ceiling fans, blackout curtains and generous wardrobe storage throughout.

Offered freehold, fully furnished and turnkey. Plai Laem is one of Samui’s most desirable north-east enclaves — moments from Choeng Mon, Fisherman’s Village and Bang Rak, with Chaweng’s dining and lifestyle a short drive away — a home equally suited to full-time living or a high-yield holiday rental.

features.l: Four en-suite bedrooms · five baths · sleeps 8
